title: Draw Me Closer

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: To You I lift my weary soul
Through darkest nights and deepest cold
My trust in You will never fade
Though enemies would see me break

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Show me Your ways, O Lord divine
Guide my feet, make Your paths mine
Teach me truth with gentle hand
For You're the God who helps me stand

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Remember me in mercy, Lord
Let Your love be my reward
Forget the sins of younger days
Draw me closer to Your grace
Draw me closer to Your face

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Good and upright is Your way
Teaching sinners day by day
Leading humble hearts to light
Showing wrong from what is right

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Every path You walk is true
Covenant love in morning dew
For those who keep Your sacred ways
Finding shelter all their days

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Remember me in mercy, Lord
Let Your love be my reward
Forget the sins of younger days
Draw me closer to Your grace
Draw me closer to Your face

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: My eyes are ever on Your face
Through trials deep and moments frail
Release my feet from tangled snares
Turn to me and ease my cares

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Lonely am I, poor in spirit
Guard my soul, let me inherit
Promise sweet and burden light
Lead me through the endless night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Remember me in mercy, Lord
Let Your love be my reward
Forget the sins of younger days
Draw me closer to Your grace
Draw me closer to Your face
In You I place my refuge sure
Let integrity and truth endure
Redeem Your people, set us free
For all our hope, O God, in Thee

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Remember me in mercy, Lord
Let Your love be my reward
Forget the sins of younger days
Draw me closer to Your grace
Draw me closer to Your face

epigraph: let not mine enemies triumph over me
